name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 15 Sep 2021
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"As part of this release, we bring you a new feature - DNS Setup. Now, you'll be able to set up your sending and link tracking domains through a self-driven process."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about the feature, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"New Feature – DNS Setup","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now manage your DNS setup on the application UI. The feature enables you to add and manage Sending Domains and Link Tracking Domains for your account."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": If you are a new user, the DNS setup is a mandatory step that you must complete before you can start sending email campaigns."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Click your username in the top-right corner of the application and from the drop-down menu, select Settings. On the Settings page, you'll find the newly added section – DNS Setup."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/DNSSetup.0685g000006wWT1AAM.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/DNSSetup.0685g000006wWT1AAM.png","name":"DNS_Setup","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1267,"width":2557}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Sending Domains","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Sending Domain refers to the domain that is used for sending email campaigns. The Sending Domains index page (Settings page > Sending Domains) is where you can view all the Sending Domains added to your account. Here, you can add a new Sending Domain and manage the existing ones."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Set-Up-and-Manage-Sending-Domains","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Set Up and Manage Sending Domains"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SendingDomains.0685g000006wWSrAAM.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SendingDomains.0685g000006wWSrAAM.png","name":"Sending_Domains","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1252,"width":2558}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Link Tracking Domains","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Link Tracking Domain refers to the domain that is used for tracking the sent email campaigns. The Link Tracking Domains index page (Settings page > Link Tracking Domains) is where you can view all the Link Tracking Domains added to your account. Here, you can add a new Link Tracking Domain and manage the existing ones. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Set-Up-and-Manage-Link-Tracking-Domains","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Set Up and Manage Link Tracking Domains"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/LinkTrackingDomains.0685g000006wWSmAAM.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/LinkTrackingDomains.0685g000006wWSmAAM.png","name":"Link_Tracking_Domains","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1260,"width":2556}}]}]
